title: polygala krumanina
intro: Polygala krumanina is a flowering plant species, also known as Krupala or Krumanina, which belongs to the family Polygalaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to boost the immune system and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Polygala krumanina include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, Polygala krumanina is often prepared in teas, infusions, or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
